# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / page
- [ ] Content / copy update
- [ ] Styling / UI change
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Screenshots / Preview
<!-- For UI changes, drop a before/after screenshot or GIF. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested locally in the browser
- [ ] Responsive on mobile (DevTools device toolbar)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Links and images load correctly
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if needed

## Related Issues
<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->
